# posthog_insight (Resource)

Manage PostHog insights via the insights endpoints.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `query_json` (String) Raw JSON serialized query payload accepted by PostHog (for example an `InsightVizNode` with a `TrendsQuery`).

### Optional

- `create_in_folder` (String) The folder where the insight is created.
- `dashboard_ids` (Set of Number) List of dashboard ids which should contain the insight.
- `deleted` (Boolean) Whether the insight is deleted (soft delete)
- `derived_name` (String) Insight derived name. This is auto-generated by PostHog when the name is not set.
- `description` (String) Insight description.
- `name` (String) Insight name.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID (environment) for this resource. Overrides the provider-level project_id.
- `tags` (Set of String) List of tags to apply to the insight.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the insight.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using: project_id/insight_id
terraform import posthog_insight.example 12345/678

# If project_id is configured at the provider level, you can omit it:
terraform import posthog_insight.example 678
```
